# SecExternalFormat.formatPKCS7

**Case**

Sequence of certificates, no PEM armor. PKCS7 is the Cryptographic Message Syntax Standard from RSA Security, Inc.

## Declaration

```swift
case formatPKCS7
```
title: SecExternalFormat.formatPKCS7
